title: Scarlet Soul Sect
content:
The 
Scarlet Soul Sect
 is a new and very powerful sect that emerged in the Cave World during Wang Lin's absence a thousand years following the war between the Inner and Outer Realms.

History
[
]

After 
Master Scarlet Soul
 was released by 
Wang Lin
 from 
Ye Mo's
 seal during Wang Lin's battle with the Sovereign on the false Suzaku, Master Scarlet Soul hid himself for the duration of the war to regain his lost cultivation.

After Wang Lin left for the Immortal Astral Continent Master Scarlet Soul recruited a descendant of the 
Wang Clan
, rumoured to be Wang Lin's own descendant, as a disciple and founded this sect.

He then launched an assault on the 
New Celestial Realm
, hoping to use the blood essence of the 
Cave World
's strongest Cultivators to break through to 
Golden Exalt
. His disciple was later killed by 
Thirteen
, who had recently arrived with the Half Heaven Trampling Wang Lin, 
Liu Jinbiao
, 
Xu Liguo
 and the Golden Exalt Sea Dragon.
